title: perlin~

methods.description: a float sets seed, no float sets a unique internal

body: [perlin~] is an abstraction that implements 1-dimensional Perlin Noise (a type of gradient noise developed by Ken Perlin). It uses [white~] as a noise source into a sample and hold function and generates smoothened functions according to a frequency value in Hz (values under 0 and above Nyquist are aliased).
